final:
// // This module implements a D flip-flop with an inverted enable signal. The output 'out' captures the value of the input 'in' on the falling edge of the clock 'clk' when the enable input is low.
module top_module(
input in,
input enable,
input clk,
output reg out
    );always@(posedge clk)
begin
if(enable)
    begin
    out=in;
    end
else
    begin
    out=out;
    end
end
endmodule
